label: Artificial Intelligence
beginnerDescription: AI bots and models that can process sensitive information without exposing the raw data.
technicalDescription: AI bots and models that can process sensitive information without exposing the raw data. Confidential AI is one of the clearest proofs of utility for Arcium: private prompts, secure inference, and encrypted model execution.
whyItMatters: Confidential AI is one of the clearest proofs of utility for Arcium: private prompts, secure inference, and encrypted model execution.
